blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 713 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 38°F.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
